question_prompt: Q9: How often have you had to mislead a candidate for any of these reasons?
panels: Q9: To avoid giving the candidate negative feedback about their interview performance / application
Q9: To cover up negative aspects of the company / protect the company’s reputation
Q9: To fulfill immediate hiring needs
Q9: To maintain control of the narrative during the interview process and prevent candidates from hearing bad reviews from current employees
Q9: To make the job sound better (exaggerating benefits, responsibilities, career development opportunities etc.)
Q9: To please the candidate and increase the likelihood of the offer being accepted
Q9: To protect sensitive company information
